name: bring-back-spawner-blocking
title: Bring Back Spawner Blocking
author: BeraIV
description: Reverts the 2.1 spawner changes that broke walling off nests, and adds a Mining-Patch-Planner-style selection tool, with a shortcut bar button and ALT+S keybind: drag it over spawners to drop a sparse grid of pipe ghosts out to spawning_radius. Placements are tied to your undo queue (ctrl+z undoes a whole drag at once), and the tool force-pastes over anything in the way like a blueprint would.
